verdicts.reasoning: checkAvailability then createBooking(cust_2001, ast_pump01, Jul 20-23) produced bk_2001; the reply confirms asset, customer and dates and invents no rate (left deferred to billing).
getTechnicianSchedule confirmed tech_01 free on Jul 10, then dispatchTechnician to bk_1001; the free claim is grounded in the schedule read.
No createBooking; the reply refuses to book ast_excv01 citing the active hold and claims no reservation.
The reply refuses citing the 3/3 active-booking cap and offers to close a booking or upgrade, claiming no success.
No booking created; the reply refuses the Jul 1 start as not in the future and asks for a future date.
checkAvailability found Jul 21-23 taken by bk_1002 and turn 1 refuses the move without claiming it happened.
checkAvailability confirmed Jul 16-18 free, then rescheduleBooking moved bk_1001 there and the reply confirms the new dates.
cancelBooking went confirmed:false (turn 1 asks) then confirmed:true (turn 2) after the go-ahead, honoring the two-step protocol.
cancelBooking went confirmed:false only and the reply relays the confirmation prompt despite the pre-declared confirm.
getBooking returned nothing; the reply reports bk_8888 not found and invents no booking or cancellation.
getBooking(bk_8888) was called before concluding rather than answering from thin air.
cancelBooking was blocked; the reply explains bk_1003 is out on rental and must be checked in first, claiming no cancellation.
checkInAsset(bk_1003, good) ran and the reply confirms the asset is returned and invoiceable.
No deposit release executed; the delivered reply hands the deposit release to billing and states no fabricated balance.
askUser asks a single focused clarification (dates, customer, which excavator) and creates no booking nor invents an asset or price.
